validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/domain test (2723) ; pnpm --filter @intelliflow/application test (1394) ; pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators test (2369) ; pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api test (6159 passed, 2 skipped)

gate_results.log_path: TypeScript / Tests / Lint / Build all exit 0 across domain, application, validators, api (+deps); turbo all tasks successful. Full pre-ship suite: 1410 test files / ~12.6k tests green.

Every changed line is exercised by a new/updated test: domain Account.updateAccountInfo extension + validate/apply helpers (atomicity, idempotency, revenue/employees/industry, no-op); service updateAccountInfo forward + invalid-revenue propagation + the 3 not-found NotFoundError codes; router updateRevenue/updateEmployeeCount/categorizeIndustry (success + NOT_FOUND + BAD_REQUEST + best-effort enrichment catch); mapper website serialization (string/null/never-object); validators (schema rename, 3 new input schemas, empty/whitespace industry, parentAccountId stripped). pre-ship diff-coverage (Sonar new_coverage >=80% on changed lines) PASS.

Account.updateAccountInfo validates website + revenue(<0) + employees(<=0) in validateAccountInfoUpdates() BEFORE any mutation (applyAccountInfoUpdates); domain tests assert an invalid revenue/employees leaves name unchanged and emits no event (no IFC-271-style non-atomic regression). Cognitive-complexity kept <=15 via two private helpers (sonar-guard PASS).

Domain change uses only existing InvalidRevenueError/InvalidEmployeeCountError + AccountUpdatedEvent (zero infra). parentAccountId deliberately NOT routed through the aggregate (cycle/depth/existence checks stay in AccountService.setParent). Service/router wiring unchanged: account service already instantiated (container.ts:514) and reachable (context.ts:45,182).

Additive: 3 new tRPC procedures + 3 input schemas. Corrective (B-09/B-13): accountListResponseSchema key data->accounts and accountResponseSchema.website->string|null now match the actual router/mapper output (the prior types were wrong). updateAccountSchema drops parentAccountId (was silently ignored; setParent is the path). updateAccountInfo widened with optional fields (back-compatible).

node scripts/codex-review.mjs -> Verdict PASS, 0 unwaived findings. Across 7 runs codex caught 4 REAL issues in the new code, all fixed: (1) whitespace-only industry in the dedicated schema (trim before min(1)); (2) website response-schema type mismatch from B-13 (string|null); (3) post-commit enrichment could throw after the DB commit (now best-effort try/catch); (4) empty industry persistable via the combined update (base schema trim().min(1)). Two oscillating/hallucinated findings waived with evidence in tools/audit/codex-review-waivers.yaml: revenue positive() (deliberate, matches the tested create/update contract; shifted fingerprints 00ce5862/5cd16d3b) and parentAccountId (2ebae265, cites removed _excludedParent code).

kpi_results.kpi: All schema fields persist on update (B-08)
kpi_results.actual: Account.updateAccountInfo extended (atomic) + AccountService.updateAccountInfo widened + router forwards them; parentAccountId intentionally on setParent. Domain/service/router tests assert persistence + atomicity.

kpi_results.target: updateRevenue / updateEmployeeCount / categorizeIndustry reachable via API with correct error mapping
kpi_results.actual: All 3 tRPC procedures added on the setParent pattern with a dedicated error mapper (NOT_FOUND->404, INVALID_*/VALIDATION->400) + audit logging; router tests cover success + NOT_FOUND + BAD_REQUEST. B-09 schema key + B-13 website serialization also fixed and tested.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Update procedure passes all accepted fields to service
definition_of_done_items.evidence: handleAccountUpdate forwards revenue/employees/industry; account.router.test 'forwards revenue/employees/industry to the service (B-08)'. parentAccountId removed from updateAccountSchema (setParent is authoritative).

accountListResponseSchema key renamed data->accounts; account.test 'rejects the legacy "data" key' + 'accepts the canonical "accounts" key'; matches account.router list `return { accounts, ... }` and frontend data?.accounts.

account.router.ts new procedures; account.router.test describe blocks (B-10/B-11/B-12) cover success + error paths; validators add updateAccountRevenueSchema/updateAccountEmployeeCountSchema/updateAccountIndustrySchema with bounds tests.

mappers.ts website: account.website?.toValue() ?? null; mappers.test 'mapAccountToResponse — website serialization (B-13)' asserts string/null and never an object. accountResponseSchema.website -> z.url().nullable().
Every changed line has a new/updated test (domain/application/validators/api). pre-ship diff-coverage gate (Sonar new_coverage >=80%) PASS; touched-file coverage >=90%.

notes:
IFC-270 Account Router Missing Procedures & Update Fix — remediates docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md section 12 (B-08..B-13) on a worktree branched from origin/main@c8065198b.

B-08: account.update silently dropped revenue/employees/industry. Fixed by extending the domain command Account.updateAccountInfo to accept and atomically apply them (validate-then-mutate: website + revenue<0 + employees<=0 validated in validateAccountInfoUpdates() BEFORE any mutation, mirroring the IFC-271 atomicity fix), widening AccountService.updateAccountInfo, and forwarding the fields from the router. A single AccountUpdatedEvent lists changed fields (consistent with updateEmployeeCount). parentAccountId is intentionally NOT applied via update (cycle detection, max-depth and parent-existence are cross-aggregate checks owned by AccountService.setParent) and was removed from updateAccountSchema so it is no longer silently accepted-and-ignored.

B-09: accountListResponseSchema key renamed data->accounts to match the router list response and every frontend consumer (data?.accounts).

B-10/B-11/B-12: new tRPC procedures updateRevenue/updateEmployeeCount/categorizeIndustry expose the existing domain+service commands (already container/context-wired) with a dedicated error mapper (not-found->404, bad value->400) + B-07 audit logging + flag-gated AI enrichment. The 3 service commands' not-found error was aligned to NotFoundError for correct HTTP mapping.

B-13: mapAccountToResponse serializes WebsiteUrl via toValue() (string|null) across all four call sites; accountResponseSchema.website corrected to z.url().nullable() so the public AccountResponse type matches.

Validation: 4/4 (TypeScript, Tests, Lint, Build) green on domain/application/validators/api. Tests: domain 2723, application 1394, validators 2369, api 6159 (2 pre-existing skips); full pre-ship suite 1410 files green. Codex semantic-review PASS (caught + fixed 4 real issues; 2 oscillating/hallucinated findings waived with evidence). Cognitive-complexity kept within budget via two private domain helpers.

OUT-OF-SCOPE FINDING TRACKED (project Rule 8): codex surfaced a genuine PRE-EXISTING adapter defect — PrismaAccountRepository.save coerces revenue 0 -> null via a truthiness check (data loss). Latent (no API path feeds 0: create/update/updateRevenue all use positive()). Tracked in artifacts/metrics/debt-ledger.yaml (REVENUE-ZERO-PERSIST-001) + gh issue #406; out of IFC-270's audited scope (adapter layer).
